concepts.PROCEDURE_RECEIVED_BY_PATIENT_7_DESC: Question as to whether the procedure (immunization, etc.) was actually received by the patient.
concepts.IMMUNIZATIONS_5_DESC: Information gathered from the pediatric return visit form.  Captures basic information about immunizations administered during a visit.
concepts.VACCINATION_DATE_4_DESC: The full date of a vaccination
concepts.DIPHTHERIA_TOXOID_/_HEPATITIS_B_VACCINES: Diphtheria toxoid / hepatitis B vaccines / pertussis, acellular / tetanus toxoid / haemophilus capsular oligosaccharide
concepts.MEASLES_VIRUS_VACCINE_LIVE,_ENDERS'_ATTE: Measles Virus Vaccine Live, Enders' attenuated Edmonston strain / Mumps Virus Vaccine Live, Jeryl Lynn Strain / Rubella Virus Vaccine Live (Wistar RA 27-3 Strain)
